'''鈭歽-f-th''' ('''kayafath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electropolymerise|electropolymerise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electropolymerise|electropolymerise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-f-th
|-
! Lemma
| kayafath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyafath|thiyafath]] || [[word:jiyafath|jiyafath]] || [[word:shiyafath|shiyafath]] || [[word:kiyafath|kiyafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyafath|thuthuyafath]] || [[word:jujuyafath|jujuyafath]] || [[word:shushuyafath|shushuyafath]] || [[word:kukuyafath|kukuyafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyafath|thuyafath]] || [[word:juyafath|juyafath]] || [[word:shuyafath|shuyafath]] || [[word:kuyafath|kuyafath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyafath|thuyafath]] || [[word:juyafath|juyafath]] || [[word:shuyafath|shuyafath]] || [[word:kuyafath|kuyafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyafath|theyafath]] || [[word:jeyafath|jeyafath]] || [[word:sheyafath|sheyafath]] || [[word:keyafath|keyafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyafath|thothoyafath]] || [[word:jojoyafath|jojoyafath]] || [[word:shoshoyafath|shoshoyafath]] || [[word:kokoyafath|kokoyafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyafath|thoyafath]] || [[word:joyafath|joyafath]] || [[word:shoyafath|shoyafath]] || [[word:koyafath|koyafath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyafath|thoyafath]] || [[word:joyafath|joyafath]] || [[word:shoyafath|shoyafath]] || [[word:koyafath|koyafath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]] || [[word:yafath|yafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yafath|th忙yafath]] || [[word:j忙yafath|j忙yafath]] || [[word:sh忙yafath|sh忙yafath]] || [[word:k忙yafath|k忙yafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayafath|thathayafath]] || [[word:jajayafath|jajayafath]] || [[word:shashayafath|shashayafath]] || [[word:kakayafath|kakayafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayafath|thayafath]] || [[word:jayafath|jayafath]] || [[word:shayafath|shayafath]] || [[word:kayafath|kayafath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayafath|thayafath]] || [[word:jayafath|jayafath]] || [[word:shayafath|shayafath]] || [[word:kayafath|kayafath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayafath|shayafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayafath|goshayafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayafath|gokishayafath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayafathn眉|shayafathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayafathnkn眉|goshayafathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafathn眉|gokishayafathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayafathsh毛|shayafathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayafathnksh毛|goshayafathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayafathsh毛|gokishayafathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafathro|shayafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafathnkro|goshayafathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafathro|gokishayafathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafathmu|shayafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafathnkmu|goshayafathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafathmu|gokishayafathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayafathsher|shayafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayafathnksher|goshayafathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayafathsher|gokishayafathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayafathng|shayafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayafathnkng|goshayafathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayafathng|gokishayafathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayafathya|shayafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayafathnkya|goshayafathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayafathya|gokishayafathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayafathyam|shayafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayafathnkyam|goshayafathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayafathyam|gokishayafathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafathn眉sh毛|shayafathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafathnkn眉sh毛|goshayafathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafathn眉sh毛|gokishayafathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafathn眉ro|shayafathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafathnkn眉ro|goshayafathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafathn眉ro|gokishayafathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafathn眉mu|shayafathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafathnkn眉mu|goshayafathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafathn眉mu|gokishayafathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafathsh毛n眉|shayafathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafathnksh毛n眉|goshayafathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafathsh毛n眉|gokishayafathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafathsh毛ro|shayafathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafathnksh毛ro|goshayafathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafathsh毛ro|gokishayafathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafathsh毛mu|shayafathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafathnksh毛mu|goshayafathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafathsh毛mu|gokishayafathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafathron眉|shayafathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafathnkron眉|goshayafathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafathron眉|gokishayafathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafathrosh毛|shayafathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafathnkrosh毛|goshayafathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafathrosh毛|gokishayafathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayafathromu|shayafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayafathnkromu|goshayafathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayafathromu|gokishayafathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayafathmun眉|shayafathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayafathnkmun眉|goshayafathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayafathmun眉|gokishayafathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayafathmush毛|shayafathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayafathnkmush毛|goshayafathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayafathmush毛|gokishayafathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayafathmuro|shayafathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayafathnkmuro|goshayafathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayafathmuro|gokishayafathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
